'''Jurgan Kalta''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who was active during the [[Time/Legends|time]] before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] of [[3996 BBY]]. In his quest to gain recognition as a mercenary, Kalta made use of his favored [[Jurgan Kalta's assault rifle|assault rifle]], a powerful [[Jurgan Kalta's carbine|carbine]], and a custom [[Jurgan Kalta's power suit|power suit]] that left him without equals in conventional combat. In addition to his combat prowess, Kalta was known for his ability to adapt to any scenario or environment. However, despite his skills, Kalta's enemies were eventually able to outsmart the Zabrak mercenary with a [[gaxxan brain-slug]] placed on his [[Pillow/Legends|pillow]]—an unconventional attack that ended up [[Death/Legends|killing]] him. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3956 BBY]], his powerful equipment had been scattered throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and was for sale at various locations.

==Biography==
[[File:JurganKaltasAssaultRifle.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Jurgan Kalta's assault rifle]]
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="kotor" /> Jurgan Kalta was active as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]],<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|196|Kalta, Jurgan}}</ref> which was fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the forces of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] [[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Sith Empire]]<ref name="kotorcg" /> during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3996 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> During his career, one of Kalta's goals was to become well known as a mercenary. While he favored his [[Jurgan Kalta's assault rifle|assault rifle]], Kalta also commissioned a powerful [[Jurgan Kalta's carbine|carbine]] to use in combat. Despite his many enemies, the Zabrak mercenary was able to overcome his opponents due to his adaptability and the use of his custom [[Jurgan Kalta's power suit|power suit]]. After his enemies were unable to [[Death/Legends|kill]] him in conventional combat, a [[gaxxan brain-slug]] was left on his [[Pillow/Legends|pillow]], which ultimately ended Kalta's life.<ref name="kotor" />

Following his death, Jurgan Kalta's weapons and [[Armor/Legends|armor]] were eventually separated and scattered throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="kotor" /> By the year [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="kotorcg" /> his [[Assault blaster rifle|assault rifle]] had ended up in the possession of a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] businessman named [[Crattis Yurkal]], who placed the weapon up for sale at 8,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in his [[Aratech Mercantile|shop]] within the [[Jedi Enclave]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Around the same time, Kalta's [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] was for sale at 4,500 credits at the [[Hunting Lodge]] of an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] named [[Fazza Utral]], which was located in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. His [[Power armor/Legends|power suit]] ended up in a secret stash of high-quality equipment owned by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] [[Mika Dorin]], who ran [[The Drunk Side]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in a settlement known as [[Dreshdae]] on the planet [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. While he would not sell items in his stash to the general public, Dorin was willing to sell the armor for 10,000 credits to invited individuals, who were sometimes directed to the shop by his associate, a Twi'lek named [[Ziagrom]].<ref name="kotor" />

==Personality and traits==
While working as a mercenary, Jurgan Kalta had the goal of gaining recognition, and his preferred method of attracting attention was through the pain of his enemies. Although he found destruction to be amusing, Kalta favored adaptability over sheer power when it came to weapons. While his skills aided him in combat against his enemies, he was outwitted via the use of a gaxxan [[Brain/Legends|brain]]-[[Slug (creature)/Legends|slug]], which ended up killing him.<ref name="kotor" />

==Equipment==
During his career as a mercenary, Jurgan Kalta's favorite weapon was his assault [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]], as the weapon shared his adaptive qualities. His rifle was extremely accurate and was especially effective against [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. He also commissioned a highly accurate and powerful carbine, which he viewed to be amusingly destructive. For protection, Kalta wore a custom power suit that made him very difficult to defeat in combat. In the end, all of his powerful equipment was unable to prevent his death.<ref name="kotor" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jurgan Kalta was first mentioned in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', where the Zabrak mercenary was only mentioned in the descriptions for his assault rifle, carbine, and power suit. The player could purchase Kalta's assault rifle from Crattis Yurkal on Dantooine and his carbine from Fazza Utral on Tatooine. For Kalta's power suit to be available, the player must first escape from the [[Interdictor-class cruiser|Sith Interdictor ship]] [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']] and meet with a Twi'lek named Ziagrom in the landing area of any planet. The Twi'lek would speak to the player and give directions to his associate Mika Dorin on the planet Korriban. After this chain of events, the player could purchase many powerful items, including the power suit, from Dorin's shop located in the Dreshdae cantina. However, Ziagrom does not always appear every time the game is played through, and if he does not speak to the player, Kalta's power suit cannot be purchased.<ref name="kotor" />
